lint.command: No lint script defined in package.json; per project guidance, no lint command exists.

blockingIssues.description: The no-runtime startup path still sets `marketDataRuntimeState.initialSyncCompleted = true` directly without advancing `hotDataRevision`. Because `/simple/price` and `/coins/markets` now only invalidate on revision mismatch, any cached responses created before this direct state transition would remain valid for up to the TTL and can contradict the new post-sync policy. The shared invalidation contract should be driven from every state transition that changes hot-endpoint visibility, not only from `createMarketRuntime()`.

appliedUpdates.description: Documented the hotDataRevision runtime-state invariant required for cross-endpoint hot-cache invalidation coherence.
